base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of world_8_2_layout — a tile (level_layout) from 1985 super mario bros. Overworld with cliffs, death-pits, Lakitus. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Overworld with cliffs, death-pits, Lakitus; harder 4-1-style with no mercy.
